title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: ```md ## Happy auth-stale Recovery: Completion Note - Completion scope: - `[what shipped]` (auth-stale detection, reauth continuation, existing UX path preserved) - `[what was intentionally not changed]` - Evidence: - `[test/script name]` → `PASS` - `[artifact path or run id]` - `[key runtime signal confirming re-entry worked]` - Residual manual-only check: - Run one real iPhone/PWA auth-expired → reauth → return-to-task flow, and confirm `Now/Tasks/Recover` visibility in live environment. ``` Single-lane draft only; final closure should still be confirmed via required multi-lane consensus.
